name: blogging-starter
description: Starter external plugin pack for blogging and editorial workflows

performance.name: clarity-and-structure
performance.description: Produce concise, coherent outlines and drafts with clear narrative flow
success_criteria: Outline includes intro, body sections, and conclusion
Draft summaries avoid filler and remain actionable

performance.name: audience-fit
performance.description: Align topic framing and tone with target audience
success_criteria: Audience intent is reflected in headings
Tone remains consistent for intended readers

environment.name: editorial-workspace
environment.description: Structured writing workflows for blogging and long-form articles

actuators.name: blog_outline
actuators.description: Generate a structured blog outline from topic and audience

actuators.name: blog_draft_summary
actuators.description: Generate a concise draft summary with key takeaways
